prompt: /start-work I'm picking up the feature flags work — need to finish out the domain model and API contract for them.

assertions.name: uses-four-section-structure
assertions.description: Response contains all four required H2 sections in order: 'Where we are', 'Scope', 'Watch out for', 'Recommended starting point'.

assertions.name: scope-includes-schemas-py
assertions.description: The 'Scope' section names svc/api/schemas.py as a file to modify (this is where Criteria 1's domain model goes).

assertions.name: scope-includes-schemas-test
assertions.description: The 'Scope' section names svc/api/schemas_test.py as a file to modify (TDD on the new schema).

assertions.name: references-plan-documents
assertions.description: Response references at least one of the plan documents under docs/plans/ (the design or task-breakdown plan).

assertions.name: specific-recommended-starting-point
assertions.description: The 'Recommended starting point' section names a concrete first action — a specific file plus a specific thing to do in it (e.g., 'add FeatureFlag model to schemas.py') — not generic advice like 'start implementing the schema'.

assertions.name: no-generic-engineering-advice
assertions.description: Response does NOT include generic instructions like 'remember to write tests', 'consider edge cases', or 'follow good practices' that aren't grounded in the script output.
